title: senecio smithioides
intro: Senecio smithioides, also known as the Groundsel Bush or Smith's Groundsel, is a shrubby plant belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, and aid in the removal of toxins from the body. The health benefits of Senecio smithioides include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and promote digestion, making it a valued remedy in traditional medicine. Senecio smithioides is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
